svg.text: Federation Heavy Cruiser (CA) · Ref R2.2 · SSD page + control overlay
SSD PAGE · interactive control overlay on top
actual SSD page image (owner's scan) — shown here as an equivalent rendering; live state overlaid on top
The page scan is the display; nothing is redrawn.
Each hotspot binds to a content boxId (B3).
Non-owners get the Data fallback view (fog).
The real SSD page is the display · the hotspot overlay carries live state, clicks, and rule links · image gated to owners
